summary: Added a read-only doctor/--doctor envelope to fleet-refill-signal.sh so the cross-orch refill surface can be inspected without writing its coordination ledger or dispatching peer sessions.

proof.summary: 13/0 including doctor read-only envelope, no ledger write, direct-dispatch absence, local-ready, peer-ready, no-ready, and no-idle-capacity fixtures.
13/0 canonical receiver remains wired to the functional test.
doctor_subcommand_status moved to basic; mutates_state=yes; ownership=own.

boundaries: No direct NTM/wezterm dispatch surfaces added.
Doctor mode is read-only and does not append the cross-orch coordination ledger.
Canonical CLI scoping remains separately classified as missing; this closeout is limited to doctor-mode gap reduction.
